summary: The diff shows only minor modifications to backend/main.mo (which appear to preserve existing logic) and an update to project_state.json marking the deployment as 'pending'. There is no evidence of actual mainnet deployment configuration: no dfx.json updates with mainnet network settings, no canister IDs assigned, no frontend assets canister configuration, and no deployment scripts or CI/CD changes. The feature request AR-1 is marked 'pending', indicating deployment has not occurred.

missing_requirements.requirement: Deploy backend Motoko canister to Internet Computer mainnet and assign a stable canister ID.
missing_requirements.reason: No dfx.json or canister_ids.json file is added or modified to reflect a mainnet canister ID assignment. No deployment artifacts are present.

missing_requirements.requirement: Deploy frontend assets canister to Internet Computer mainnet served at a permanent ic0.app URL.
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend canister configuration, no canister_ids.json with frontend canister ID, and no ic0.app URL evidence exists in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Application accessible via permanent URL without requiring a local replica.
missing_requirements.reason: No network configuration pointing to the ICP mainnet is present; no evidence of mainnet deployment having been completed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Internet Identity authentication continues to work on the mainnet deployment.
missing_requirements.reason: No configuration changes referencing the mainnet Internet Identity canister ID are present in the diff.
